title: Product sync — 2026-05-03
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-05-03
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- Northwind Trading escalated Reporting & Export problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'Real-time cursor presence' across accounts.
- Eng notes Reporting & Export generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'Real-time cursor presence' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate Reporting & Export performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with Northwind Trading.
